rows.label: qev055202_MSG0001
rows.name:
When we were still within the
Growth, the Orphe used this smoke
to warn each other of danger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055202_MSG0002
rows.name:
I never could have predicted it would
be useful in a situation like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055202_MSG0004
rows.name:
He appeared somewhat exhausted,
but I predict a swift recovery.
There is no need for concern.[ST:wait ]
